title: CubeQuest Modpack
description: A moderately difficult adventure/survival modpack with elements of building and tinkering thrown in it as well.
body:
![The CubeQuest Logo!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e119c04ac087ae095ec812db3de2f2aee760c38.png)

# Welcome to CubeQuest!

CubeQuest is a very large, somewhat difficult take on a survival/adventure modpack which focuses less on linear progress and railroaded quests and more on an open-ended world for you to explore and ~~hopefully not be killed like eighty-thousand times.~~ (Although you are very likely to die at first.) Why be locked into one path in a modpack when you can make your own Quest?

**(IT IS RECOMMENDED TO RUN CUBEQUEST WITH AT LEAST 8 GB OF RAM ALLOCATED TO THE INSTANCE)**

## Features

CubeQuest is a huge modpack with over 300 unique mods, meaning there is quite a lot for you to do in the modpack, from building to exploration to combat!

### Building

CubeQuest features the addition of hundreds, if not thousands, of unique building blocks from mods such as Supplementaries, Valhesia Furniture, and more! 

![A bunch of modded Minecraft blocks crammed together into a showcase picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IsIkgbkY/images/101408859affa03e7c2574c370bfe971bf73b400.png)

### Combat

CubeQuest features several mods, most notably the Better Combat mod, to enhance and reinvigorate 1.20.x Minecraft combat into a system which actually feels fun (and sometimes difficult)! Wield a variety of two-handed, one-handed, or throwable weapons to your heart's desire and wear, enchant, and trim a variety of new, unique armors as well!

![An image of Swizzle being eclectic with her armor choices.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IsIkgbkY/images/9340fb418bbdeb78189ea931c9507c4e544d0ecc.png)

### Survival

Make sure to keep an eye on your thirst bar (hint hint: craft a campfire cauldron to purify water) and your modified hunger bar to stay alive! (Eat a diverse set of foods to properly fill up, no more steak-spamming!) Also try not to die to mobs, which is a given, albeit a bit harder in this modpack. 

![The hotbar in the CubeQuest modpack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a88145907f3b801b28c4a3cdcb1be3377837ad6.png)

![Another picture of me keeping warm in some hot springs in front of a scenic nighttime setting. Very nice.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IsIkgbkY/images/9342c6a1441199fb23ad3ad7e2004cb4547932a7.png)

### World Generation

Experience beautiful mountains, deep caves, vibrant forests, and more in this modpack! Travel through many new and improved generated structures, both dangerous and friendly!

![An image of a Minecraft village surrounded by several different modded biomes, at night from above.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IsIkgbkY/images/c49854ff49f92f4c8c97e48df664bf4cd4581e1c.png)

### Adventure

Have fun taking on dungeons, the natural elements, and even several moderately-to-severely tough new boss fights! Also, visit two new dimensions as well as revamped versions of the Nether and End dimensions!

![A picture of the Void Blossom boss mob in its natural habitat.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IsIkgbkY/images/4e6e6148d3433f7818373bf5ec7223bcef47036f.png)

![A picture of a cavern in the Bumblezone dimension of this modpack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IsIkgbkY/images/5942f9e51c5046c8cfcd3a66cf76a310babac86a.png)

![A picture of a mysterious complex in the barren wastes of the Sculk Depths dimension of this modpack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IsIkgbkY/images/49d892654d18804047791fea72cb5d56a6505fe5.png)

### Shader Support?

Yes! Shaders are supported thanks to the wonderful Iris Shaders mod!

**I hope you enjoy playing my modpack! Follow me over on my YouTube channel (@zyxeyswizzle & @zyxeyswizzleplays), my Twitch (zyxeymc), on Bluesky (@zyxeyswizzle.bsky.social), or join my [Discord server!](https://discord.gg/wgkQmZ2zmB)
